TaskDescription: Reaction time (RT) per trial — time from stimulus onset to first button press. (OLMM project)

onset.Description: Reconstructed trial onset in seconds from the start of the run, computed as the cumulative sum of preceding trial durations.

duration.Description: Reaction time in seconds (stimulus onset to button press).

response_time_ms.Description: Reaction time from stimulus onset to first button press. Derived from 'reaction_time' column (original values in seconds) multiplied by 1000.

learning_stage.Description: Learning stage identifier derived from 'stage' column (LS1–LS4).

response_port.Description: Not recorded in df5.csv — always n/a.
